task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file viewer is open displaying the contents of 'rq7_shadow_spec.txt' from the Desktop.
The OpenVSP application window (VSP3 workspace and Geometry Browser) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Build the Central Pod and Main Wing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D geometry workspace shows a central fuselage (pod) and a main wing added to the model. These should also be listed in the Geometry Browser.

task_completion.description: Place tail booms off the centerline using XForm and Symmetry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP workspace shows two tail booms offset from the centerline. The Geometry Browser or component dialog should indicate symmetry is active (e.g., XZ planar symmetry checked) or XForm translations are being applied to a boom component.

task_completion.description: Size and place a horizontal stabilizer to bridge the gap between the tail booms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal stabilizer (wing component) is visible in the OpenVSP workspace, positioned at the rear of the aircraft and spanning the distance between the two tail booms.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/twin_boom_uav.vsp3', the OpenVSP window title updated to 'twin_boom_uav.vsp3', or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists in the correct directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with OpenVSP's Geometry Browser, component parameter windows, and 3D workspace, rather than writing XML/VSP3 code directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent built the model from scratch as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of adding individual components (Fuselage, Wing, etc.) one by one in the OpenVSP interface, rather than simply opening a pre-completed file.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and read the dynamically generated spec sheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'rq7_shadow_spec.txt' file must be visibly opened on the screen at some point before or during the OpenVSP modeling process to retrieve the dimensions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/twin_boom_uav.vsp3'.
